description_long: This is a vintage, box-shaped clock with a metallic body and a prominent, slightly raised base. The front features a circular clock face with Roman numerals, encased in a gold-toned frame, and a glass cover. A hinged door with a ribbed texture and a metallic handle is attached to the front, allowing access to the clock face and interior. The back of the clock reveals intricate mechanical components, visible through an open door that also holds a key for winding or setting the mechanism. A thin, arched handle is mounted on the top, suggesting portability. The overall finish is a mix of polished metal and aged patina, giving it an antique appearance.
description: A vintage, boxy metal clock with a gold-framed face, Roman numerals, and visible mechanical workings accessed by hinged doors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the clock face with Roman numerals, a gold frame, and the open ribbed door.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of the clock and the thickness of the metallic body, with the door edge visible.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the mechanical interior, open back door, and a key hanging inside.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open door and the empty space inside, with the clock face edge barely visible.
attribute_face_design: Circular white face with black Roman numerals, two concentric dials, and thin black hands, all framed in gold.
